#Chinese President #Xi Jinping voiced hope 2026 would be "a historic, landmark year" marked with opening a new chapter in China-US relations. "China and the United States have more common interests than differences," Xinhua quoted him as saying while opening the summit talks with #US President Donald #Trump in #Beijing on Thursday morning. "Success in one is an opportunity for the other, and a stable bilateral relationship is good for the world," the Chinese leader told his guest.  #Kuna

#US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said #China has strong economic & strategic incentive to step in & help curb Iran's actions in the Arabian #Gulf. Warning the ongoing crisis threatens global stability, he said, in an interview with Fox News, ships tied to China are effectively stuck in the region amid uncertainty over safe passage through the Strait of #Hormuz.  #Kuna

التقى اللواء الركن يوسف عبدالله الكعبي، قائد الطيران المشترك، اللواء مايكل لييني، نائب القائد العام لقيادة القوات البرية المشتركة في الجيش الأمريكي المركزي. وتناول اللقاء عدد من المواضيع ذات الاهتمام المشترك وتعزيز تبادل الخبرات في المجالات العسكرية والدفاعية، وبحث فرص التعاون بما يخدم المصالح المشتركة بين البلدين. The US Navy has forced back a Greek oil tanker carrying Iraqi crude that had been cleared by Iran to transit the Hormuz Strait, marking the first reported case of a non-Iranian vessel being turned back at the US blockade line.
The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps' Tehran unit has concluded a major five-day military exercise focused on combat readiness against US-Israeli threat scenarios.
Hezbollah Secretary-General Naim Qassem pledged Monday that the group will never abandon the battlefield against Israel, arguing the cost of resistance is lower than that of surrender.
A senior Iranian lawmaker has said 90% uranium enrichment could be one of Iran's options in the event of a renewed attack.

Iran's Deputy Foreign Minister for Legal Affairs has warned that any UN Security Council draft on the Strait of Hormuz that fails to address the aggression and illegal blockade against Iran will be biased and doomed to failure.

Iran has repeatedly said that the United States is playing a double game by seeking negotiations while sustaining military pressure, and warned that no breakthrough is possible until Washington fundamentally changes course.
